expectations.text: HTML file includes Three.js CDN script tag
expectations.evidence: importmap with three.module.js from jsdelivr CDN found
OrbitControls imported from three/addons/ and initialized with enableDamping

expectations.text: Page has a two-panel layout with 3D canvas on the left
expectations.evidence: #canvas-panel and #controls-panel with flex layout; canvas on left

expectations.text: Right panel has controls to select shape type (cube/sphere/torus)
Right panel has a color control (input or picker)
Right panel has a size/scale control
expectations.evidence: input type='range' id='size' with min/max for scale present

expectations.text: Output HTML file is saved inside the assets/ directory
